title: Autoglym Scratch Removal Kit For Car Paintwork - Includes Scratch Remover, Super Resin Polish, Hi-Tech Finishing Cloth, and Scratch Removal Applicator
features: Say goodbye to unsightly scratches and blemishes on your car's exterior with our easy-to-use scratch removal kit which includes 100mL Scratch Remover, 100mL Super Resin Polish, Hi-Tech Finishing Cloth, and Scratch Removal Applicator
Scratch Remover has been carefully blended to achieve the optimum balance of deep cut with a high gloss finish.
Save money on costly professional repairs and restore your car's appearance at home with our affordable and highly effective scratch removal kit
Scratch Remover is safe to use on solid colour and metallic paints, but should not be used on matt or satin paintwork. If you are at all unsure please contact Autoglym for guidance
The product has been designed for removal of scratches of car paintwork. It should not be used on glass or plastic substitutes.
description: From the manufacturer Autoglym Scratch Removal Kit Start to Finish Scratch Solution Our specially formulated Scratch Remover compound removes scratches and polishes the area for a high gloss finish. Easy Application The kit comes with a waffle applicator and microfibre cloth that provide you with the best results. Includes Super Resin Polish The UK's favourite polish ensures any surrounding paintwork is finished to a high gloss. Brilliant High Gloss Finish Our Scratch Removal Complete Kit has been carefully designed to achieve the optimum balance of deep cut with a high gloss finish.
